session.user:
Run the following CI checks and report all results: 1. `ruff check src/ tests/` (linting) 2. `ruff format --check src/ tests/` (formatting) 3. `ty check src/` (type checking) 4. `pytest tests/ -x -q --timeout=30` (all unit tests)
Report all results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report.
session.assistant: I'll run all the CI checks and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ tests/

tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/

Exit code 1 ........................................................................ [ 1%] ........................................................................ [ 2%] ...............................F =================================== FAILURES =================================== __________________ test_execute_split_plan_creates_worktrees ___________________
def test_execute_split_plan_creates_worktrees() -> None: """Normal execution creates worktrees."""
# Create fake git ops class FakeGit: def __init__(self): self.created_worktrees = []
def add_worktree(self, repo_root, path, *, branch=None, ref=None, create_branch=True): self.created_worktrees.append((repo_root, path, branch, ref, create_branch))
plan = SplitPlan( stack_branches=["main", "feat-1", "feat-2"], branches_to_split=["feat-1", "feat-2"], existing_worktrees=[], target_paths={ "feat-1": Path("/repo/erks/feat-1"), "feat-2": Path("/repo/erks/feat-2"), }, source_worktree_path=Path("/repo"), repo_root=Path("/repo"), skipped_current=False, skipped_trunk=True,
... [52 lines omitted] ...
E AttributeError: 'FakeGit' object has no attribute 'worktree' src/erk/cli/commands/stack/split_old/plan.py:207: AttributeError FAILED tests/cli/commands/split/test_plan.py::test_execute_split_plan_creates_worktrees - AttributeError: 'FakeGit' object has no attribute 'worktree' !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
session.assistant:
## CI Check Results
**Summary:** 3 of 4 checks passed. 1 test failure found.
### 1. ruff check (linting) **PASSED** - All checks passed!
### 2. ruff format (formatting) **PASSED** - 1144 files already formatted
### 3. ty check (type checking) **PASSED** - All checks passed!
### 4. pytest (unit tests) **FAILED** - 1 test failure found
**Failure Details:**
File: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/cli/commands/split/test_plan.py` Test: `test_execute_split_plan_creates_worktrees` Line: 286 Error Type: `AttributeError` Message: `'FakeGit' object has no attribute 'worktree'`
**Root Cause:** The test defines a `FakeGit` class with `add_worktree()` method directly, but the actual code at `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/stack/split_old/plan.py:207` expects `git_ops.worktree.add_worktree()` (accessing a `worktree` attribute first). The fake doesn't match the production code's interface.
